successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LeaveType, LeaveRequestStatus, and LeaveRequest with fields id, employeeId, leaveType, startDate, endDate, status, approverEmployeeId, and createdAt.
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exists and exports the LeaveRepository interface with create, findById, and findByEmployeeId methods operating on LeaveRequest types from leave.model.ts.
src/modules/leave/postgres-leave.repository.ts exists and exports PostgresLeaveRepository implementing LeaveRepository using PostgreSQL through pg Pool.
A PostgreSQL migration exists that creates the leave_requests table with the specified columns, constraints, and indexes.
Vitest repository tests verify persistence of LeaveRequest records, retrieval by id, and listing by employeeId while referencing the canonical LeaveRequest model types.

constraints: All database access must go through repository interfaces (Repository pattern).
PostgresLeaveRepository must implement LeaveRepository and use LeaveRequest types imported from src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts.
All LeaveRequest type definitions remain centralized in src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts for this phase.
All state-changing operations must write an audit record.
No sensitive data may be logged.
No unhandled promise rejections; all async errors must be caught and handled.
Scope is limited to leave domain models, repository contracts/implementation, migration, and repository tests defined for Phase 1.
outOfScope: Fastify API endpoints and API-layer concerns for leave management (Phase 4).
Leave service layer business workflows not described in this phase.
Additional repository methods beyond create, findById, and findByEmployeeId.

ambiguities.description: The requested test file path differs from the architecture specification.
options: Create tests/unit/modules/leave/leave.repository.spec.ts as stated in the intent.
Create src/modules/leave/postgres-leave.repository.test.ts as stated in the architecture notes.

ambiguities.description: The intent mentions DTOs used by persistence, but the architecture only defines LeaveType, LeaveRequestStatus, and LeaveRequest.
options: Define only the types explicitly listed in the architecture.
Add separate persistence DTO types in leave.model.ts in addition to LeaveRequest.
